Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension29-May-2025Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Diabetes self management plan03-Oct-1985Prediabetes (finding)
  • Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes, including diet, exercise, and blood glucose monitoring strategies.
  • Patient will achieve and maintain HbA1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
  • Patient will achieve a 5% reduction in body weight through dietary changes and increased physical activity.
  • Patient will achieve fasting plasma glucose below 100 mg/dL.
  • Patient will engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.
